comparison.method: deep-equal of distributions+meta(stripped)+per_photo after stripping per-run UUIDs and re-sorting per_photo by path

next_steps: No action required from this rerun. The tool baseline is canonical for the next #5-bootstrap shadow-eval gate.
When #5-bootstrap candidate weights ship, rerun this same baseline against the candidate ONNX and compare tool_count / tool_score_quantiles / recognition_items_total deltas as the regression gate.
Same rerun pattern can be applied to the face baseline (docs/baselines/2-distribution-face-baseline.json) when face-side weights change.
non_goals: Not a precision/recall measurement (use tools/eval_pr.py + #2c fixture for that).
Not a labelled fixture; pure descriptive distribution.
Does not exercise the wo_raw recall path or any reverse-smoke logic (see 2a-real-reverse-smoke baseline for that axis).

rerun.driver: tools/eval_distribution.py against the live server (PID 2955495 :18799, no reboot, no orchestrator)
rerun.report_archive: /tmp/2-tool-rerun-2026-04-29.json (not committed; equivalent to parent baseline modulo project/work-order UUIDs)

verdict: PASS — zero engine drift over 2026-04-27 → 2026-04-29 window. Tool / face / device count distributions, score quantiles (face min/p25/median/p75/max + tool min/p25/median/p75/max), recognition_items_total distribution, photo_status, recognition_items_status, and every per_photo row are byte-identical to the parent baseline.
why_run: Bracket the recent #2-family work (#2a / #2a-real / #2a-real-reverse / #2c-asia / #5-bootstrap-collector / pipeline #3.3 doc). None of those touched the recognition engine, but the rerun closes the verification loop so future #5-bootstrap retrain has a solid identity-baseline to A/B against.
